questions.question: Write a C program to declare an array of 5 integers and initialize it with values from 0 to 4. Then, print the array elements. Compare it with the given values.
questions.hint: Use C programming language and explain the concept of array initialization

questions.question: What is the difference between a 1D array and a 2D array in terms of memory allocation? Provide an example to illustrate your answer.
questions.hint: Explain the concept of memory allocation for arrays

questions.question: A 1D array of 10 integers is declared and initialized with values from 0 to 9. Write a program to find the maximum element in the array. Compare your answer with the actual value.
questions.hint: Use C programming language and explain the concept of finding the maximum element in an array
